name: Feature request

## Problem Statement

What user or operator problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior and API/UX changes.

## Alternatives Considered

List other options and why they are less suitable.

## Acceptance Criteria

Define concrete, testable criteria for completion.

## Additional Context

Add links, design notes, or related issues/PRs.
